creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Fabian Wenk from comment #13)
Yes, you can safely change it back to /tmp/mysql.sock and I don't expect any problems in a near couple of years. This location is used on FreeBSD for more than 20+ years and every package expect it here. That's why the change to /var/run/mysql/mysql.sock is so problematic now. 
I guess nobody tested all ports working as MySQL / MariaDB client with this changed location.
